headlines.title: Democratic battles and incumbents on defense: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries
headlines.description: The fight to shape the future of the Democratic Party is playing out in a slew of key primaries across six states Tuesday, as races across six states set the matchups in crucial November battlegrounds and settle personal and ideological battles across the country

headlines.title: Trump speaks to NBC News amid Iran talks and administration's apparent abandonment of $1.8B fund
headlines.description: President Trump said he would be 'okay' if the Iranian regime refused to return to talks. The administration also appeared to abandon its $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Russia targets Kyiv with massive overnight attack
headlines.description: More than a dozen people were killed and hundreds more inured after an overnight barrage of Russian missiles and drones targeted the Ukrainian capital. Russia had previously warned that it intended “systematic strikes” on targets in Kyiv linked to Ukraine’s military, urging foreigners to leave.

headlines.title: Trump to drop controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund
headlines.description: President Trump is expected to make an announcement about plans to drop the Justice Department's "anti-weaponization" fund. NBC News' Melanie Zanona has details on the backlash the fund has faced on Capitol Hill.

headlines.title: Scott Pelley accuses CBS News’ Bari Weiss of ‘murdering’ ‘60 Minutes’
headlines.description: “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley accused CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss of “murdering” the venerable newsmagazine at a staff meeting with Nick Bilton, the technology journalist tapped to oversee the show, according to an audio recording and a source who was in the room.

headlines.title: Meet the Harvard grad who might lead the U.S. to World Cup glory
headlines.description: Matt Freese once wrote a college research project on penalty kicks. Now he’s competing to be the starting goalie for the U.S. men’s national team at this summer’s World Cup.

headlines.title: Hurricane season begins, with the first below-average forecast in a decade
headlines.description: Hurricane season in the Atlantic kicked off Monday, and for the first time in more than a decade, forecasters expect it to be slower than usual.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: What to watch in today’s primaries and Russia bombards Ukraine: Morning Rundown
headlines.description: Primaries are happening in six states across the U.S., including a governor’s race where a former reality TV star is tightening the contest.

headlines.title: Israel and Hezbollah trade new attacks despite Trump promise of de-escalation
headlines.description: The Israeli military launched deadly new strikes in Lebanon on Tuesday after reporting attacks from Hezbollah overnight, despite President Donald Trump saying both sides had agreed to de-escalate after Iran threatened to pull out of peace talks

headlines.title: Meet the Harvard grad who might lead the U.S. to World Cup glory
headlines.description: Matt Freese once wrote a college research project on penalty kicks. Now he’s competing to be the starting goalie for the U.S. men’s national team at this summer’s World Cup.

headlines.title: Iowa gunman suspected of killing 6 family members then himself
headlines.description: Authorities in Iowa are investigating the fatal shootings of six people who they believe were killed by a relative who took his own life when confronted by police Monday
